prestazioni: Engine: 3.3L Twin-Turbo Lambda II RS T-GDi (Engine Code: G6DH) - Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX4267R Gen II turbos (67mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe featuring a 4.5" V-band outlet and a secondary O2 sensor delete for optimized spool and reduced backpressure. Supporting mods include a PTP Turbo Inlet Pipe with integrated MAF housing and a CSF Racing front-mount intercooler (bar-and-plate core, 3.5" inlet/outlet) to maintain IATs under 40°C at 22psi boost levels.

Fuel System: Full return-style fuel system conversion using Radium Engineering's 200LPH dual-pump surge tank (PN: 20-0111) with integrated -6AN feed/return lines, paired with Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (1,700cc/min) and a Motec M150 ECU for closed-loop lambda control. The stock fuel rails are retained but drilled for -8AN fittings to support the increased flow, while the factory fuel pump is bypassed entirely.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Wavetrac ATB differential (84-1000) with a 3.90:1 final drive ratio swap, paired with a full Driveshaft Shop Stage 3 carbon fiber driveshaft (1350-series U-joints) to handle 600+ lb-ft of torque. Suspension is a full Ohlins Road & Track kit (DFV) with custom valving for the G80's 5-link rear setup, featuring 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping and helper springs for aggressive preload. The front sway bar is replaced with an Eibach 28mm adjustable unit (PN: 3850.3102), while the rear receives a 22mm Whiteline adjustable bar (PN: BSR75XZ).
estetica: Aero: Full Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (G80-specific, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares) with integrated carbon fiber side skirts and a custom 3D-printed front splitter featuring a 40mm overhang and integrated canards. The rear wing is a dry carbon fiber Voltex Type-5 (1,800mm span) with a 120mm Gurney flap and adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees). Underbody, a full Varis Japan front diffuser (3-channel design) and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts are installed, reducing lift by 38% at 160mph (validated via wind tunnel testing).

Wheels & Stance: Custom 20x10.5" ET15 (front) and 20x12" ET20 (rear) forged wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami (1,200g per wheel, 5x114.3 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear). The suspension is set to a static -35mm drop (Ohlins DFV collars) with a 5mm front spacer to correct scrub radius, while the rear is pulled in 15mm via custom adjustable toe arms (SPL Parts) for aggressive stance without fender rub at full lock.

Interior & Lighting: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior with custom Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, 6-point Schroth harnesses) and a stripped-out rear cabin featuring a full custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, 6-point with integrated harness bar) by The Driveshaft Shop. Lighting is upgraded to full LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with integrated DRLs and a custom sequential turn signal mod (using OEM Genesis wiring harness adapters). The rear features a custom LED taillight setup with a sequential startup animation and integrated brake light dimming for track use.
